utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , the reason why I asked you guys out to brunch today is because I have been doing some thinking about who should be my maid of honor .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God ! This is it ! I really hope it is you !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well umm , I was thinking that maybe we could come up with a system where we trade off being maid of honor for each other .

utterances.text: Like hypothetically , if Phoebe were mine

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Rachel would be Phoebe , I would be Rachel , that way we all get to do it once and no one would get upset .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah that is actually a pretty good idea .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well that is the best part . Umm , you guys get to decide !
